findings.description: PascalCase class names `SqlRow` and `Blob` appear in the s2 code examples (`SqlRow record = getRecord(request)` and `(Blob) record.get("FILE_DATA")`) but are absent from the hints array.
findings.source_evidence: SqlRow record = getRecord(request); ... StreamResponse response = new StreamResponse((Blob) record.get("FILE_DATA"));

findings.description: PascalCase class name `SqlResultSet` appears in the s3 code example (`SqlResultSet records = getRecords(request)`) but is absent from the hints array.
